sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33326" key="e)laio/garon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐλαιό-γᾰρον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n33326.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fish preserved in oil</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0724.tlg002:2:309D" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Steph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Hp.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.309D.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
